note: All 13 case(s) below were published directly to TestRail outside this repo's /fetch-section -> /migrate-section pipeline and were never tracked locally until this backfill (2026-07-23). Case IDs and creation dates indicate they predate this migration project. Content is taken verbatim (HTML converted to plain text only) -- no v2 style-rewrite, Plan Gates extraction check, or Suite 6 source_case_ids cross-reference has been done yet; grill_status is honestly marked not-tracked-by-repo rather than assumed confirmed. live TestRail section "Header" is a top-level section (no parent), not nested under "Dashboard". testrail-suite-v2.md's tree was updated 2026-07-23 to reflect this as top-level section 18.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the header bar renders with all required controls

steps.content: Verify the CookieYes logo is present in the header.
steps.expected: The CookieYes logo should be visible in the header and should navigate to /dashboard when clicked.

steps.content: Verify the website-selector dropdown is present next to the logo.
steps.expected: The website-selector dropdown should be visible showing the current site URL.

steps.content: Verify the "Become a partner" dropdown is present on the right side of the header.
steps.expected: The "Become a partner" dropdown should be visible in the header.

steps.content: Verify the Documentation icon is present in the header.
steps.expected: The Documentation icon should be visible in the header.

steps.content: Verify the Notifications (bell) icon is present in the header.
steps.expected: The Notifications icon should be visible in the header.

steps.content: Verify the Profile dropdown is present in the header.
steps.expected: The Profile dropdown should be visible at the right end of the header.

steps.content: Verify the current plan area shows the plan label and pageviews usage.
steps.expected: "Current plan: Free" and "Pageviews used: 0/5,000 (0%)" with an info icon should be displayed.

steps.content: Verify the plan button is present next to the current plan label.
steps.expected: A plan button reading "Try Pro for free" (when the free trial is available) or "Upgrade" (when it is not) should be displayed.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the website selector lists existing sites grouped by organisation
cases.preconditions: Account has at least one organisation with one or more sites.

steps.content: Confirm the website selector shows the current site URL.
steps.expected: The current website name/URL should be displayed in the website selector.

steps.content: Click the website selector.
steps.expected: The dropdown should open with a search field and the list of existing websites, with the current site highlighted.

steps.content: Observe how the websites are grouped.
steps.expected: Each website should be listed under its corresponding organisation, with the organisation name and Org ID shown as a group header.

steps.content: Select a different website from the list.
steps.expected: The app should switch context and load the dashboard for the selected website.

steps.content: Observe the bottom of the dropdown.
steps.expected: A "+ New Site" option should be displayed at the bottom of the dropdown.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the website selector search returns the matching site for a valid URL
cases.preconditions: Account has at least one existing website.

steps.content: Click the website selector.
steps.expected: The dropdown should open with a search field and the existing websites list.

steps.content: Enter the URL of an existing website in the search field.
steps.expected: The matching website should be displayed under its corresponding organisation.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the website selector search shows an error for an invalid URL
cases.preconditions: Account has at least one existing website.

steps.content: Click the website selector.
steps.expected: The dropdown should open with a search field and the existing websites list.

steps.content: Enter an invalid URL in the search field.
steps.expected: A "No Websites Found!" error message should be displayed.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the "+ New Site" option is disabled when the email is not verified
cases.preconditions: User's account email is not verified.

steps.content: Click the website selector.
steps.expected: The dropdown should open with a search field and the existing websites list.

steps.content: Hover over the "+ New Site" option.
steps.expected: A "Please verify your email to add new site" notification should be displayed.

steps.content: Click the "+ New Site" option.
steps.expected: The "+ New Site" option should be greyed out and not clickable, and the Add a new site page should not open.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Refer & Earn button opens the Join Referral Program form
cases.preconditions: User's account email is verified (Refer & Earn appears only after email verification).

steps.content: Confirm the "Refer & Earn" button is present in the header.
steps.expected: The "Refer & Earn" button should be visible in the header.

steps.content: Click the "Refer & Earn" button.
steps.expected: The "Join Referral Program" popup should be displayed.

steps.content: Observe the form fields in the popup.
steps.expected: First Name, Last Name, and a Reward Currency dropdown should be displayed, with the Terms and Conditions checkbox.

steps.content: Open the Reward Currency dropdown.
steps.expected: The dropdown should offer USD $, GBP £, and EUR € options with USD $ selected by default.

steps.content: Confirm the "Join Program" button is present.
steps.expected: The "Join Program" button should be visible and interactive.

steps.content: Click the "Strategic Partner" option.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Profile dropdown navigates to each account management page

steps.content: Click the Profile dropdown in the header.
steps.expected: The Profile dropdown should open showing the account email plus Organisations & Sites, Team, Billing & Invoices, Notifications, My account, and Logout options.

steps.content: Click "Organisations & Sites".
steps.expected: The Organisations & Sites page should be displayed.

steps.content: Click "Team".
steps.expected: The Team page should be displayed.

steps.content: Click "Billing & Invoices".
steps.expected: The Billing & Invoices page should be displayed.

steps.content: Click "My account".
steps.expected: The My account page should be displayed.

steps.content: Click "Logout".
steps.expected: The user should be logged out and the Login page should be displayed.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the navigation tabs open their respective pages

steps.content: Confirm the navigation bar shows the expected tabs.
steps.expected: Dashboard, Cookie Banner, Cookie Manager, Consent Log, Languages, Advanced Settings, Legal Policies, and Reports tabs should be displayed, with Dashboard active by default.

steps.content: Click the "Cookie Banner" tab.
steps.expected: The Cookie Banner page should be displayed.

steps.content: Click the "Cookie Manager" tab.
steps.expected: The Cookie Manager page should be displayed.

steps.content: Click the "Consent Log" tab.
steps.expected: The Consent Log page should be displayed.

steps.content: Click the "Languages" tab.
steps.expected: The Languages page should be displayed.

steps.content: Click the "Advanced Settings" tab.
steps.expected: The Advanced Settings page should be displayed.

steps.content: Open the "Legal Policies" dropdown and select each option.
steps.expected: The dropdown should show Cookie Policy Generator and Privacy Policy Generator, each opening its respective page.

steps.content: Click the "Reports" tab.
steps.expected: The Reports page should be displayed.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the pageviews usage is displayed and updates with website traffic

steps.content: Locate the pageviews usage under the current plan label.
steps.expected: Pageviews usage should be displayed in the format "x / limit (n%) pageviews used".

steps.content: Hover over the pageviews info icon.
steps.expected: A tooltip should be displayed showing the pageviews reset date and a "Learn more" link.

steps.content: Click the "Learn more" link in the tooltip.
steps.expected: The pageviews documentation page should be displayed.

steps.content: Generate website pageviews and return to the dashboard.
steps.expected: The pageviews count should increase to reflect the recorded website views.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the header pageview counter shows plan plus extra pageviews with reset info
cases.preconditions:
The account is on a non‑trial, active paid plan on a live website with an active banner configured.

Extra pageviews are already enabled on the account (not being enabled during the test).

Pageview usage has exceeded the plan's allotted limit — i.e. usage is over 100%, so extra pageviews are actively being consumed (the counter must be past the limit, not exactly at it — at exactly 100% the header shows 100,000/100,000 (100%) with no + extra segment).

steps.content: Observe the pageview usage indicator in the dashboard header.
steps.expected: Pageviews used should be displayed in the format "Pageviews used: [plan pageviews used] (n%) + [extra] extra" with an info icon next to it.

steps.content: Hover over the info icon next to the pageview counter.
steps.expected: A tooltip should appear stating the pageviews reset date ("Pageviews will reset on [Month DD, YYYY]") with a "Learn more" link.

steps.content: Click the "Learn more" link in the tooltip.
steps.expected: The pageview documentation page should be displayed.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the header pageview counter reflects extra pageviews after they are enabled
cases.preconditions:
The account is on a non‑trial, active paid plan on a live website with an active banner configured.

The plan's allotted pageviews have been fully consumed.

Extra pageviews have just been enabled from Billing & Invoices.

steps.content: Navigate to the Dashboard.
steps.expected: The Dashboard should be displayed.

steps.content: Observe the pageview usage indicator in the header.
steps.expected: Pageviews used should be displayed in the format "Pageviews used: n + [extra pageview count] extra" with an info icon, reflecting the additional pageviews.

steps.content: Hover over the info icon.
steps.expected: A tooltip should appear stating "Pageviews will reset on [Month DD, YYYY]" with a "Learn more" link.

steps.content: Click the "Learn more" link.
steps.expected: The pageview documentation page should be displayed.
